title: Pluto's Coffee Mod
body: ![](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/pluto7073/PlutosCoffeeMod-Fabric?label=Latest%20Release&style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/enviornment-both-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-fabric-blue?style=for-the-badge) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Create your very own coffee shop! Pluto's Coffee Mod adds coffee and related features into the game ### Want More Drinks? Check out the entire Pluto's Drinks collection [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/n9TVye64)! ## Features - Coffee Cherries, Beans, Grounds, and Coffee - Brew using the Coffee Brewer - Add in milk, sugar, caramel, and mocha using the Coffee Workstation - Steam milk and pull espresso shots to create lattes ## Cross Mod Features - Coffee will hydrate you in the [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration) mod - Lattes support Farmer's Delight Milk Bottles (as of 3.0) ### More Information on [The Wiki](https://github.com/pluto7073/PlutosDrinksAPI/wiki) ### Forge Version? I lack the time, energy, or attention span to learn an entirely new modloader so not planned. ### Modpacks? Feel free to use in modpacks as long as you credit me! [Report a Bug](https://github.com/pluto7073/PlutosCoffeeMod-Fabric/issues)
